_comment: List of packages the app expects to be installed. The checker reads package.json + node_modules/<pkg>/package.json to verify each one. Add an entry per critical dep so a missing module shows a clear fix command instead of a runtime stack trace.

required.name: @supabase/supabase-js
required.reason: Auto-generated src/integrations/supabase/client.ts imports from this package.

required.name: @tanstack/react-query
required.reason: QueryClientProvider wraps the app in src/App.tsx.

required.name: react-router-dom
required.reason: Used by BrowserRouter / Routes in src/App.tsx.

optional.name: lucide-react
optional.reason: Icon set used by shadcn components.
